title: Re-generate API resource tokens from an OpenAPI spec

specPath.description: Local path or https:// URL to the OpenAPI 3.x YAML or JSON spec file

outputDir.description: Output directory for generated files (relative to workspace root)

baseUrlToken.description: Name of the InjectionToken holding the API base URL

tagFilter.description: Comma-separated list of OpenAPI tags to include (empty = all tags)

namingConvention.description: File naming convention: kebab-case filenames with SCREAMING_SNAKE token names

providedIn.description: none: export provideX() helpers for scoped provision. root: self-registering singleton.

includeMocks.description: Generate a .mock.ts file per endpoint using @constantant/openapi-resource-mocks. Requires the package to be installed.
